title: Latvia's President Rinkēvičs heading north for Estonian state visit
summary_full: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will embark on a three-day visit to northern neighbour Estonia on July 1st.
summary_public: Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will embark on a three-day visit to northern neighbour Estonia on July 1st.
